description: CompositionCream floral printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round neck with piping in blue and green, and a buttoned chest placketFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this stylish kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
